Follow-Up clinical data

Source: R/follow_up_clinical_data.R
follow_up_clinical_data.Rd

This dataset contains follow-up clinical assessments from the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI).

Usage

follow_up_clinical_data

Format

A data frame with rows and variables as described in the ADNI documentation.

RID

Participant roster ID

VISCODE

Visit code

EXAMDATE

Date

DX

Diagnosis

CDRSB

CDR-SB

ADAS11

ADAS 11

ADAS13

ADAS 13

MMSE

MMSE

RAVLT_immediate

RAVLT Immediate

RAVLT_learning

RAVLT Learning

RAVLT_forgetting

RAVLT Forgetting

Source

Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI)

On this page
